title: Berry Pouch [Cobblemon]
description: A simple mod that adds some small gadgets related to Cobblemon.
body:
**The Berry Pouch adds a dedicated berry bag to your Cobblemon experience, making berry collection and organization much easier.**

- While carrying a Berry Pouch, any berries you collect are automatically deposited into the pouch, eliminating the need for manual sorting.
- The Berry Pouch supports all berries added by Cobblemon. The upper slots are designated for Natural Berries, while the lower slots are for Mutation Berries, allowing players to easily track their collection progress.
- The 16 unrestricted slots on the right can store items with the berrypouch:other_bait tag. They are primarily used for the [Poké Rod](https://wiki.cobblemon.com/index.php/Pok%C3%A9_Rod)'s extension feature: automatic bait reloading. Additionally, these slots support loading Poké Baits with custom effects.


  ![BerryPouch](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20ee4ba55cfaa58ac0398beff8428145a5ddd401.png)

- Dedicated accessory slot and shortcut key for the Berry Pouch.

  ![slot_key](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f65682213597b2bef6fac2224cf1151ab8d046b8.png)

***

**The Pokéball Launcher is a new item added in the 0.5.0 update.**

- It helps you save inventory space so you can carry more Pokéballs. Its functionality is very similar to the Berry Pouch; you can use a hotkey to cycle through the Pokéballs in its slots and launch them.
- The model and texture will change as you switch between different Pokéballs.

  ![gun](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2e44586c2297accdd577d0e0443fec858e6ca58.gif)

***

- This Video will help you learn about the 0.5.0 update.
